case_title: YOUSUF BHAIJEE ET AL VS. AUDREY YI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $90.00) SERVED OCT-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YI, AUDREY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YI, AUDREY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BHAIJEE, YOUSUF BHAIJEE, MARIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT YI, AUDREY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BHAIJEE, YOUSUF BHAIJEE, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YI, AUDREY $4,085.50 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,225.50, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $4085.50 PLUS COSTS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,585.50 FILED BY BHAIJEE, YOUSUF BHAIJEE, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT YI, AUDREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFFS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS YOUSUF BHAIJEE AND MARIA BHAIJEE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT AUDREY YI IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON PLAINTIFFS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,985.50 FILED BY YI, AUDREY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BHAIJEE, YOUSUF BHAIJEE, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFFS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS YOUSUF BHAIJEE AND MARIA BHAIJEE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT AUDREY YI IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON PLAINTIFFS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
